changes_summary:
**Addressing flag-1 (prompt restructuring):** Completely restructured the system message to have triage as the top-level concern — "You are an AI assistant for a video effect creation tool" with explicit QUESTION MODE vs EFFECT MODE routing and examples. Technical rules are scoped under "EFFECT MODE rules" header. User message changed from "Build a..." to neutral "User request for..." framing. This addresses the concern that a small exception buried in OUTPUT_RULES would be unreliable against the strongly code-generation-only prompt contract.

**Addressing flag-2 (unsafe classifier):** Replaced the `no exports.default + MESSAGE` heuristic with two completely independent signals: (1) `// QUESTION_RESPONSE` is a distinct marker checked in a separate function (`extractQuestionResponse()`) before code extraction even runs — it's a binary gate, not a heuristic. (2) `// MESSAGE:` is a standard metadata line on code responses, handled identically to NAME/DESCRIPTION/PARAMS. A malformed code response with MESSAGE but no QUESTION_RESPONSE marker flows through the normal code validation path unchanged — if `exports.default` is missing, validation throws, retry fires. The two paths never interact.
questions: Should the agent message support multi-line/markdown formatting, or is plain text sufficient? The QUESTION_RESPONSE body is multi-line plain text. The MESSAGE metadata line is single-line. This could be extended later.
For question-only responses, should the prompt input be cleared (current plan) or preserved so the user can see what they asked? Clearing matches existing code-generation behavior.

success_criteria.criterion: Edge function returns a `message` string field when LLM includes a // MESSAGE: line in code generation responses
Edge function returns `isQuestionResponse: true` with message and no code when LLM outputs // QUESTION_RESPONSE marker
Question-only responses do not trigger code validation errors or retry logic — extractQuestionResponse() runs before extractEffectCodeAndMeta()
Malformed code responses that include // MESSAGE: but lack exports.default still trigger validation failure and retry (not misclassified as question response)
EffectCreatorPanel displays the agent message inline when present
Agent message is dismissible and clears on new generation or form reset
Question-only responses in edit mode do not overwrite existing code/name/schema state in the panel
Existing effect generation flow (create, edit, retry) continues to work unchanged when no MESSAGE or QUESTION_RESPONSE is present in LLM output
System prompt triage section is at the top level of the system message, not buried in output rules
Message display is visually consistent with the panel's existing design language (bg-muted/40, border-border)
LLM reliably distinguishes questions from effect requests (>90% accuracy on obvious cases)
No new files created — all changes are edits to existing files
Manual smoke tests: generate effect with message, ask a question in create mode, ask a question in edit mode (code preserved), dismiss message, verify retry still works

assumptions: Plain text messages are sufficient for v1 — QUESTION_RESPONSE text is plain prose, MESSAGE is 1-2 sentences
Question detection works in both create and edit mode per user requirement
In edit mode question responses, the LLM outputs QUESTION_RESPONSE (no code) and the frontend preserves existing code/name/schema untouched
The dismiss button uses the X icon from lucide-react which is already imported in the project
No persistence of messages beyond the current dialog session — messages are ephemeral state
Retry/fix mode always uses code generation framing (never question-routed) since retries are inherently code-fixing operations
